emails.subject: Refund issue
emails.body: I was charged extra on my last invoice. Please refund the difference immediately.

emails.subject: Login problem
emails.body: I cannot login to my account. It says my password is wrong but I just reset it.

emails.subject: General question about pricing
emails.body: Hi, I'd like to know more about your enterprise pricing plans. Can you send me details?

emails.subject: URGENT: Service completely down
emails.body: Your service is completely broken for our entire team. We are losing revenue every minute. Fix this NOW.

emails.subject: Feature feedback
emails.body: I love the new dashboard feature! Just wanted to say the UX team did a great job.
